reviews.comment:
Lindo, pero no puede haber solo una persona atendiendo el servicompras en plena época de vacaciones, justo cuando esta lleno de gente! Pobre empleada!

(Translated by Google)
Nice, but there can't be only one person working at the convenience store during peak holiday season, especially when it's packed! Poor employee!

reviews.comment:
Flojo de mercadería el AM PM, mucho desorden en temporada para ingresar a cargar combustible

(Translated by Google)
Slow stock AM/PM, very disorganized during peak season when trying to get fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNOTc2WDB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy mal servicio, tardan mucho en atender, no andan bien los dispenser. Poca gente atendiendo. Además la comida es muy mediocre y el precio muy elevado. No paro más acá.

(Translated by Google)
Very bad service. They take a long time to serve, and the dispensers don't work properly. There are few people serving. The food is also mediocre and the prices are very high. I won't be back here again.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNOS1LS09nEAE
